raw_title: Network Histories: Methods and Measures for Studying Interdependence and Interconnectedness Within Digital Journalism
title_en: Network Histories: Methods and Measures for Studying Interdependence and Interconnectedness Within Digital Journalism
title_zh: 网络历史：研究数字新闻业内部相互依赖与互联性的方法与测量
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了如何研究数字新闻业中不同部分如何相互连接和依赖。它介绍了分析这些关系的方法和测量工具，帮助理解新闻机构、平台和技术如何共同工作。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to study how different parts of digital journalism connect and depend on each other. It introduces methods and measurement tools for analyzing these relationships, helping understand how news organizations, platforms, and technologies work together.
research_direction_zh: 该研究关注数字新闻生态系统的结构分析，旨在开发评估新闻网络动态和演变的方法论框架。
research_direction_en: This research focuses on structural analysis of digital journalism ecosystems, aiming to develop methodological frameworks for assessing the dynamics and evolution of news networks.
